title: Diaper rash follow-up

red_flags.text: Lists emergency and face-to-face review criteria, including confusion, stiff neck, photophobia, persistent or recurrent rash, fever, immunocompromise, and diagnostic uncertainty.
red_flags.rationale: Supports persistent, recurrent, febrile and uncertain-rash referral context for diaper rash follow-up; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists emergency and face-to-face review criteria, including confusion, stiff neck, photophobia, persistent or recurrent rash, fever, immunocompromise, and diagnostic uncertainty.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Rashes in Children – 49

medication.text: Specifies visual assessment plus duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, family history, recurrence, exposures, medication, impact, travel, allergy, and pet history.
medication.rationale: Supports rash duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, exposure and medicine history for diaper rash follow-up; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Specifies visual assessment plus duration, evolution, distribution, symptoms, family history, recurrence, exposures, medication, impact, travel, allergy, and pet history.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, duration, distribution, folds, morphology, pain, fever, stool pattern, products, examination, diagnosis and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for diaper rash follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
